description_long: This is a modern flatbed van with a cab-over design, featuring a prominent front grille and large windshield for enhanced driver visibility. The cab is equipped with two side doors and side mirrors, while the rear consists of an open, flat cargo bed suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The van rides on dual rear wheels for added stability and load-bearing capacity, and the chassis is reinforced with visible undercarriage components. The exterior is primarily smooth and streamlined, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on utility and practicality. The overall design suggests it is intended for commercial or light industrial use in urban environments.
description: A flatbed van with a cab-over design, large windshield, and open rear cargo bed, built for utility and transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, headlights, windshield, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the cab, door, and the full length of the flatbed cargo area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open flatbed, rear lights, and protective cab barrier.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, door, and flatbed.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, two rear doors
